mapper.select: SELECT id, customer_name, customer_email, status, order_date, total_amount FROM orders
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (customer_name, customer_email, status, order_date, total_amount) VALUES (#{customerName}, #{customerEmail}, #{status}, #{orderDate}, #{totalAmount})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET customer_name = #{customerName}, customer_email = #{customerEmail}, status = #{status}, order_date = #{orderDate}, total_amount = #{totalAmount} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM orders WHERE id = #{id}
